spec.name: A Road Through The Plains
spec.description: You are on a dust covered east-west road crossing the grassy plains between Midgaard the forest of Haon-Dor. An occasional hunter or adventurer can be seen, heading to or from the forest. To the east is the walled city, Midgaard, and to the west the road continues towards a large forest.

east.description: To the east you see the walls and West Gate of Midgaard.

west.description: To the west the road continues towards the forest.

extra_descs.description: The large forest of Haon-dor spreads out to the west. Small and large game is plentiful there...as is adventure, and of course, danger!
The road is well used, and quite dusty.
